query: /namer creative-project --context "indie game studio making pixel art games"
expected_behavior: Agent classifies as Creative context (not Product or Brand)
Agent applies Creative preset: 55/45 intrinsic/extrinsic split
Agent prioritizes phonetic quality (35%) and memorability (35%) in intrinsic scoring
Agent checks YouTube, TikTok, X/Twitter, Reddit as primary platforms
Agent generates candidates with emphasis on evocative and invented-word archetypes
